zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés於1178年出生在西班牙時，他的父親Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos18歲，母親Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga48歲。他和Teresa de Girón至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。他於1137年被列為acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara。他去世於1236年在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés于1178年出生在西班牙时，他的父亲Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos18岁，母亲Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga48岁。他和Teresa de Girón至少有3个儿子和5个女儿。他于1137年被列为acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara。他去世于1236年在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: González
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel, Ramon, Raul, Mario.
Spanish (González): patronymic from the personal name Gonzalo . Compare De Gonzalez , Gonsales , Gunsalus , and Portuguese Goncalves .

variants.name: Gonzelez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsalez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ruben, Ignacio, Manuel, Alfredo, Elena, Felipe, Guadalupe, Gustavo, Jesus, Jorge.
Hispanic (Gonsález): altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gongalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzolas
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Ruben, Arcadio, Artemio, Erasmo, Ernesto, Eusebio, Juan, Lupe, Manuel, Miguel.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Miguel, Pedro, Albino, Amador, Angelina, Arana, Arnaldo, Blanco, Carlos, Casimiro, Castro, Diego.
Spanish: from the personal name Gonzalo, of Visigothic origin, formed with the element gunth ‘battle’.

variants.name: De Gonzalez
meanings: Spanish (De González): patronymic from González (see Gonzalez ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gozalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Ruben, Pedro, Raul, Guadalupe, Lupe.
Spanish: altered form of González (see Gonzalez ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cevallos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Pedro, Fernando, Jose, Luis, Eduardo, Francisco, Jaime, Ana, Angel.
Spanish: variant of   Ceballos  .

variants.name: Ceballos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Francisco, Mario, Sergio, Javier, Jesus, Miguel, Ramon.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Ceballos in Cantabria. Compare   Cevallos  ,   Zeballos  , and   Zevallos  .

nameMeanings.name: e
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 鄂, a short form of present-day Hubei province: (i) from E (鄂), the name of an ancient state (located in Henan province), destroyed by the king Zhou, last king of the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) from the placename E (鄂), the name of a fief (located in Shanxi province) in the state of Jin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the placename E (鄂), the name of a fief (located in Hubei province) granted to the royal members of the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) possibly a surname from minority ethnic groups in southwestern China. (v) said to be adopted as a new surname by Yue Ting, who changed his original name Yue (嶽) to E (鄂), because he fled to Huangmei in present-day Hubei province (called E (鄂) at that time) to avoid persecution after his father Yue Fei (1103–1142  AD ), a famous Chinese general in the Southern Song dynasty (1127 – 1279  AD ), was put to death by the then emperor.

nameMeanings.name: Hita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian: from the personal name Zita, from Latin felicitas ‘happiness’, which is found in central Europe as a personal name. See also Felix .
Italian: from the feminine form of   Zito  , or from a female personal name, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Felix
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Jesus, Francisco, Luis, Ramon, Raul, Carlos, Pedro, Rafael, Mario.

Spanish and French (Félix); Portuguese, English, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a medieval personal name meaning ‘happy, lucky, fortunate’ from Latin felix. The Latin form of the male name is Felix. This was a relatively common Roman surname, said to have been first adopted as a nickname by Sulla. It was very popular among early Christians and was borne by a large number of early saints.

nameMeanings.name: Ruy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Rodrigo .  This form was common in the Middle Ages, being borne, for example, by  El Cid ,  Ruy Diaz de Vivar  (  ?1043–99 ).

nameMeanings.name: o
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Rodrigo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. It was the name of the last king of the Visigoths, defeated by the Moors in 711 .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés was born in 1178, in Spain, his father, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, was 18 and his mother, Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga, was 48. He had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Teresa de Girón. In 1137, his occupation is listed as acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara. He died in 1236, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés est né en 1178, à Espagne, son père, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga, avait 48 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Teresa de Girón. En 1137, sa profession de son indiquée est acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara. Il est décédé en 1236, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés 1178 in Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos 18 und seine Mutter Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga 48. Er hatte mit Teresa de Girón mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1137 ist sein Beruf als acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara aufgeführt. Er starb 1236 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés è nato il nel 1178 nel Spagna, il suo padre, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga, aveva 48 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Teresa de Girón. Nel 1137, la sua occupazione è indicata come acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara. Morì nel 1236, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclésが1178年にスペインで生まれた時，父Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballosは18歳，母Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Bragaは48歳であった。彼はTeresa de Girónとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。1137年，職業はacompaña a rodrigo gonzález de laraと記録されている。彼は1236年に故郷で58歳で死去し，スペインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés(이)가 1178년 스페인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Teresa de Girón(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1137년, 그의 직업은 acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara이었다. 그는 1236년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés nasceu em 1178, em Espanha, seu pai, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga, tinha 48 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Teresa de Girón. Em 1137, sua profissão aparece como acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara. Ele faleceu em 1236, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés родился в 1178 г. в местности Испания, его отцу по имени Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga, 48. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Teresa de Girón. В 1137 году он работал по профессии acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara. Он умер в 1236 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés nació en 1178, en España, su papá, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Maria Elvira Martinez de Hita de Braga, tenía 48 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Teresa de Girón. En 1137, su ocupación registrada era acompaña a rodrigo gonzález de lara. Murió en 1236, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en España.
